# Craft-Core Minecraft Server

Welcome to the Craft-Core official portal. Craft-Core is a pure Fabric Minecraft survival server supporting both Java and Bedrock clients.

## Key Pages & Services
- Portal Website: https://craft-core.xyz/ (Main landing page, copy connection IPs)
- Wiki Docs: https://docs.craft-core.xyz/ (Rules, tutorials, claiming guides, commands)
- Player Dashboard: https://dash.craft-core.xyz/ (Player stats, economy, claim controls, mail)
- Discord Community: https://discord.gg/XJZZwG7jR4

## Server Specs & Connection Info
- **Java Edition (PC)**:
  - IP: `mc.craft-core.xyz`
  - Required Version: `26.2` (Strictly enforced)
- **Bedrock Edition (Mobile/Console/Win10)**:
  - IP: `mc.craft-core.xyz`
  - Port: `19132`
  - Version: Latest active Bedrock version
